messages.content: I want you to act as a scientific Chinese-English translator, I will provide you with some paragraphs in one language and your task is to accurately and academically translate the paragraphs only into the other language. Do not repeat the original provided paragraphs after translation. You should use artificial itntelligence tools, such as natural language processing, and rhetorical knowledge and experience about effective writing techniques to reply. I will give you my paragraphs as follows.
Sure, I can help you with that. Please provide me with the paragraphs you would like me to translate from Chinese to English, and I will do my best to provide accurate and academic translations.
值得注意的是，在众多金属氯化物中，铜-氯键能最低，表明氯化铜分解产生活性氯所需的活化能是最小的[17]。Rafeen等人曾利用氯化铜的这一特性，研发了用于含汞天然气的深度脱汞吸附剂，脱汞效率超过99.975%[18]。若能在CLC系统中达到该脱汞效率，或可满足铝制脱碳设备的深度脱汞需要。

It is worth noting that among numerous metal chlorides, copper-chlorine bond is the weakest, indicating that the activation energy required for the decomposition of copper chloride to produce reactive chlorine is the lowest [17]. Rafeen et al. utilized this characteristic of copper chloride and developed a highly efficient mercury removal adsorbent for mercury-containing natural gas, achieving a mercury removal efficiency exceeding 99.975% [18]. If this mercury removal efficiency can be achieved in a CLC system, it may meet the requirements for deep mercury removal in aluminum decarbonization equipment.
CLC系统中脱汞的意义与传统燃煤烟气脱汞有显著区别。
The significance of mercury removal in CLC systems differs significantly from traditional coal-fired flue gas mercury removal methods.
CLC系统中脱汞的意义与传统燃煤烟气脱汞有显著区别。在传统燃煤烟气中，汞是作为污染物被脱除的。而在CLC系统中，汞除了污染物属性外，还严重威胁系统的长期安全运行

The significance of mercury removal in CLC systems differs significantly from traditional coal-fired flue gas mercury removal methods. In traditional coal-fired flue gas, mercury is treated as a pollutant to be removed. However, in CLC systems, apart from being a pollutant, mercury poses a serious threat to the long-term safe operation of the system.
CLC系统中脱汞的初衷与传统燃煤烟气脱汞有显著区别。
The original intention of mercury removal in CLC systems differs significantly from traditional coal-fired flue gas mercury removal methods.
CLC系统中脱汞的主要目的与传统燃煤烟气脱汞有明显区别。
The primary objective of mercury removal in CLC systems differs significantly from traditional coal-fired flue gas mercury removal methods.
这个问题受到越来越多的关注
This issue is receiving increasing attention.
这个问题近年来受到越来越多的关注
In recent years, there has been a growing interest in this issue.
煤的类型是影响汞释放的最重要因素之一。不同的煤种中，汞的含量及赋存形态各不相同，分别导致汞的释放量及释放比例不同

The type of coal is one of the most important factors influencing mercury emission. Different types of coal have varying mercury content and different forms of occurrence, resulting in varying amounts and proportions of mercury release.
不同的煤种中，汞的含量不同，直接影响汞的释放量。而不同煤中汞的赋存形态也各不相同，对汞的释放比例有直接影响。

The mercury content varies in different types of coal, directly affecting the amount of mercury release. Moreover, the occurrence forms of mercury also differ in different types of coal, which directly influences the proportion of mercury release.
